segment.source: Renders a card-framed table mapping feature rows against two labeled value columns (defaults Plan A and Plan B); each cell holds free text such as limits, quotas, or counts. Use it for: spec and plan comparisons with textual values — storage sizes, user counts, support levels. Prefer 'Feature Comparison Table' when cells are plain yes/no checkmarks; 'Plan Comparison Matrix' for pricing pages with up to four plans; 'Product Specs Table' for one product's label-value specs.
